entry.title: Re: Partner selection popup in VA01

entry.title: Re: How to read a SAP Note

entry.title: Re: Enable Simulation for Flexible Workflow Scenarios in Manage Workflows
entry.content:
Hi Praneetha,

thanks for reaching out and sorry for the delay. I am in parental leave until 7/4/25. The workflow engine (cross component) and team only provide the possibility to use this simulation feature. Responsible for activation (value helps) are the scenario owners / applications. Please open a customer request and name the scenarios you are using and expect to simulate in Manage Workflows.

Kind regards

SBach

entry.title: Are there any templates to document the IAS/IPS configuration ?
entry.content:
I'm trying to document the as-is configuration of our IAS/IPS instances. Does anyone have a template for this?
I'm finding it really difficult to document each piece in an organized way.

entry.title: Leading zeros in product master
entry.content:
At my current customer we need to create productnumbers with one or multiple leading zeroes. Productnumbers doesn't have the same length and we have used the tickbox in the material type to ignore the external number range, but this is not working for productnumbers only consisting of numbers.

Productnumbers are not only consisting of numbers, but could also contain letters.

Is there any way to create the external productnumbers as desired?

entry.title: Re: Correspondence: Open Item List in Public Cloud PDF Preview in Monitor Email Transmission
entry.content: Thanks for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Daniel Mateo - December 2024 Edition
entry.content: Hi @DanielMateo  - Nice to know about you and very interesting to know that from technical, you switched over to functional area.

entry.title: SAP Business One Mobile application: approval for outgoing payments missing data
entry.content:
Hello experts

I am using SBO 10.0 version for SAP HANA(10.00.191), and SBO mobile application on both Android and iOS platforms.

I am encountering an issue where some records are not visible in the mobile application when checking approvals for outgoing payments, even though these records are accessible in the SBO desktop application.

 

For instance, users can view the "OutgoingPayment-L4" record on the desktop application but are unable to see it in the mobile app.

Could you please help me with this?

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
1) If the item (i.e. Details) is visible then the text reads "Hide Details", conversely if the item is not visible the text reads "Show Details".

The text has this function for its content: 

 

The logic in the text is:

The Utility "At start or if not visible" looks like:

The flow function "SHOW Act Details" looks like this:

 

The flow function "HIDE Act Details" looks like this:

 

2) Yes, that was just an example.  I have it in an IF statement where they can set it to false. But the statement is just ignored either way.

3) I don't know if you have access or not. In the old days of AppGyver they could see inside the app if they knew the app #.  I don't know if you have that ability or not.

Thanks so much for your help so far.

Nick

entry.title: Re: Is there anyway to apply filter to SmartField
entry.content:
you need to define those attribute as ValueListParameterIn

<Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterIn">
<PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="SOLDTO_ID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="PARTNER"/>
</Record>

entry.title: Re: CIM External Tax System ID required during company co...

Thank you for your question.

I found this document: https://www.thomsonreuters.com/content/dam/helpandsupp/en-us/Topics/os-indirect-tax-family/files/osit-integration-sap-install-rfc-config.pdf

Does it include the information you're looking for?

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Report for Credit Risk Based impairment // SAP CLOUD...
entry.content:
Dear @FelixSchwarzIGB , 

thank you for your answer and showing interest in the Advanced Valuation, explicitly Credit-Risk-Based Impairment. 

An analytical which might help you to report the allowances can be the Analyze Credit Loss Allowances app. 

I hope this helps in order to meet your needs. 

Thank you and kind regards, 

Kevin

entry.title: Re: CAP application with external API on BTP
entry.content: Perhaps you are looking for what @rizing/cds-extension does. You could checkout the Productivity Tools in BAS for this in:   developing-business-applications-using-productivity-tools/working-with-external-data-models

entry.title: Date format document generation EC
entry.content:
Hi Guys, I come up with an issue, Im wondering if you can help.
I want to generate a document to the date format appear like this dd/mm/yyyy (09/12/2024) but now ever with US English, the document it generated in d/mm/yyyy 9/12/2024.

How I can, update this format, to date appear correctly in my document?

Thank you in advance.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Service Center SAP Document Management service

entry.title: Re: Hi , I have added characteristic values in CT04 in DE...
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I got CT04 access to edit in quality and production and updated the same.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: What’s New as of 2024-12-09?
entry.content:
Hello, community members! Before the fun begins for the holiday season, allow me to walk your through the enhancements and new features that SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM) has released from the previous month and up to date!

From a secure Modeling experience enhancement that will avoid unintentional deletion of functions that are associated to a process activity and the new Manage Account and Password functionality in your database settings screen.

As always, to explore previous and future enhancements introduced by SAP PaPM Cloud SM, you can search or use the relevant tag PaPMCloudWhatsNew.

Modeling Screen

A warning message will now be inserted in the message log to alert users that the "Function is in use by other process template(s)" in order to prevent the inadvertent deletion of functions that are being used in any process activity. To continue with deletion, remove dependencies.

Settings Screen

We all reached a point where we locked our accounts while attempting to sign in, without realizing that the password we were using was either incorrect or occasionally forgotten. This is the kind of situation where we want to unlock our account or reset our password quickly and easily. Now, for you as an administrator in your SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model solution, we are introducing the Manage Account and Password functionality at the application level inside the Settings Screen.

Administrators can now effortlessly manage the database user account by choosing either Unlock User, which reverts the active state of your password and unlocks your database user without creating a new password, or Reset Password, which will give you the ability to generate a new password for your database user. Now that is convenient!

⚠️ Before maximizing this feature, as an admin it is recommend to consider the following:

  1. Role/Role Collections assigned to other administrators – Manage Account and Password is possible to be utilized for roles such as: ADMIN_USER_ALL, ADMIN_USER_RESTRICTED, and SETTINGS Role/Role Collection. You may use the SETTINGS_READ role in case restriction is needed.
  2. Connections where the database user is used such as: SDA, SDI, etc. - It is always a good practice to consider these connections before resetting the password.

I'm hoping that these additional features will improve the user experience for your modelers and make it easier for administrators to manage your accounts. See you in the upcoming blog entries about your SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud - Standard Model enhancements and new features.

entry.title: Re: Validation of partner change in VA01/VA02
entry.content:
Am meeting another issue on VA01 header ,the Partner Selection pop-up Not Appearing when i change partner name ,but for other partners it works do you know why ?

i searched and i found that If the value of R185D-DATALOSS is set, it may lead to specific behavior in sessions, especially if SAP interprets this flag as an indication that automated processing (batch input) is underway.

NB: i set it as enhancment on USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAK. 

is that true ? if yes what is the alternativ solution ?

entry.title: PPOME task for creating position id is a direct master data activity in clients, agent id is affecte
entry.content:
Hi All,

As PPOME activity for position id creation is a master data activity in all clients, the ID keeps changes as its auto generated, so then my PO release strategy WF agent id is moved in a TR and the values don't match. How do ou deal this issue generally.

Thanks

Nits

entry.title: Re: sp_move_file does not find the file with "č" character in filename
entry.content: sp_move_file expects LONG NVARCHAR arguments, whereas you are supplying (LONG) VARCHAR string literal arguments. Does it work if you add a leading "N" to the literal to make it a NVARCHAR literal, such as ...sp_move_file(N'/disk....', N'/disk....') ?

entry.title: Re: In personas 3.0 how do we wrap a text to show in muli...
entry.content: Is this what you mean?

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
Hi @AndreaUS ,

first thank You for this post. Very useful ! 🙂
Our question is about that can we dynamically specify the name of the schema somehow ? The schema name would be a parameter in our scenario. Now it raises a syntax error. 

If yes, is there any ATC check we need to consider for dynamically specifying the schema ?
So far we safeguarded such dynamic selects using cl_abap_dyn_prg. 

Of course we could put a case statement and duplicate the code, but such we like to avoid when possible. 

Thank You

Attila

entry.title: Re: IW022- Material only for individual requirements (check entry)
entry.content: Were you able to solve your issue ?

entry.title: Change document types in Free Form Payment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Public Cloud Community,

I'd like to know if there is a chance to change document type for the accounting document triggered from the Free Form Payment procedure (Scope Item J60). This because after the process of free form payment, there will be generated two documents: one is belonging to F110 (triggered in automatic after this procedure) where I have Technical account @ Bank Transitory and another for cleared the previous document, in which I have Accounts Payable @ Technical account. Both this document will be created with document type "ZP" (used for automatic payment), so the requirement is to change the document type for accounting document that post Accounts Payable @ Technical account (so not triggered by F110 transaction/Manage automatic payment app).

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Installation problems
entry.content: what you did ?

entry.title: Update EC data after onboarding but before start date
entry.content:
Update EC data after onboarding but before start date - We have recently rolled out RCM & ONB2.0. However once an employee has gone through the Onboarding process and then through Manage Pending Hires, it is not possible for our HR Admin team to edit/change/correct most of the data portlets on the employee record.  They can make the changes AFTER the start date has passed but not before.  This seems like a huge oversight or perhaps something we are not informed about. We want to change data on new future hires as and when needed (like ONB1.0 and EC allowed us to).  I came across this KBA (https://me.sap.com/notes/2654997/E) however switching on these permissions allows limited visibility but no edit functionality to key data that integrates to other systems which our business processes rely on 

Please share any insights here - thank you

entry.title: Re: There is no item category assigned to account no (any...
entry.content: there is no item category assigned to account in sap

entry.title: Re: Intrastat Declaration Job Not Picking Up Entries in S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise
entry.content: Hi @t_jungesblut, how did you resolve the issue? We are facing the same problem as you.

entry.title: Re: Outgoing payment approval using Bank payment Advice i...
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, SAP Business ByDesign does not support an approval process for Bank Payment Advice. This functionality is not available and represents a potential new feature request.

We encourage you to share this requirement through the SAP Influence Channel, where new feature ideas are collected and reviewed.

You can post your feature request here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886

Best Regards,

Prathibha

entry.title: Re: OData CDS, not in SEGW, and reusing old ABAP logic ?
entry.content: it is called custom entity, google it.

Thank you,

sanjay

entry.title: BI Platform CMS System Database Universe - Missing Relationships
entry.content:
We are running BOB43, SP2 and attempting to create Webi documents showing CMS information using the BI Platform CMS System Databse.  The Webi documents run but the data is not correct.

Creating a Webi document which should show the Webi to UNX or UNX to Webi relationships isn't showing proper connections.  I get a list of documents with no UNX information or a list of UNX universes with no Webi document information.  The queries are created properly so this is not the issue.

Whatever is in the CMS that is supposed to indicate these relationships is broken.

Has anyone else noticed this when attempting to use the BI Platform CMS System Database Universe?

SOME BACKGROUND:  We converted a lot of our Webi documents from using UNV to using UNX awhile back.  When we promoted the Webi documents from our DEV environment to our PROD environment, the Webi documents run successfully but when we try to view Webi to UNX relationships using the BI Platform CMS System Database Universe, the change in relationship from UNV to UNX is not reflected in PROD.  It only shows the correct releationships in DEV.  Very odd.

entry.title: Re: TaxFactory 11.0
entry.content:
Hi @Sanjayt,

BSI is evaluating this legal change with the authority and SAP will just knows if a change is needed after this.

Kind regards,
Graziela

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
@Muthuraja_M Yes it is possible to expose data as SQL Service (Web API) from On premise system as of 2021 FP2. You can find the documentation here: Accessing ABAP-Managed Data from External ODBC-Based Clients | SAP Help Portal

Best

Andrea

thank you!

entry.title: General Release of SAP Analytics Cloud compass
entry.content:
I can't be prouder to announce the upcoming general release of SAP Analytics Could compass, which is planned for 2025 Q1 (targeted fast track 2024.25). Finally, questions such as the one here can be answered via a few clicks, instead of multi-day discussions: "What is the impact on the operating income if the inflation, labour cost and gross revenue are not as planned?"

What is compass?

Compass is the new Monte Carlo simulation functionality, enabling the analysis of possible outcomes when faced with uncertainties in performance drivers. It can be used to explore probable range of company earnings, required workforce, sales target, ROI, project duration etc. ... the list is endless. With compass, we have broken down the barrier between this mathematical technique and business users by stripping away the complexity and providing an end-user centric interface for configuration and risk analysis. Now non-technical user can also enjoy the benefits of stochastic simulation without prior advanced maths knowledge or IT setup. No more coding, no data or formula duplication; just click-and-run! Functionalities will include:

Scenario Modelling and Comparison
Model "What-if" assumptions for multiple driver fluctuations and use scenarios to group them into separate concepts. This is particularly useful for the comparison of strategies or impact of uncontrollable events. If desired, chosen scenario outcomes can be displayed alongside to compare the chances and risks involved for each. 

Multidimensional Simulation
Configure possible performance fluctuations for different dimensions and combinations (e.g. products, regions, company codes, business units, period etc.), and simulate their compound effect on a dependent target. The flexible interface also allows for the changing of multidimensional drivers without any coding. This allows e.g. the quick integration of geographical / business segment aspects into the risk analysis, and offers transparency to the assumptions made at the same time.  

Insights to Pessimistic / Realistic / Optimistic cases
The impact distribution and risk context of each scenario is made comprehensible by a graphical representation of the pessimistic, realistic and optimistic cases, each including boundary values and chances in percentile. Elements such as the color, name or percentile of each case can be customized to add more context.  

Risk Context Exploration for a Specific Goal
With compass, user can choose to explore the entire impact distribution of driver uncertainties, or zoom in to explore the chances of achieving a specific goal. Questions such as "What are the chances of us achieving 50 m$ this year?" could be easily answered. Combined with the insights from the pessimistic, realistic and optimistic cases, users can quickly comprehend whether the goal is tending towards the aggressive or conservative edge, obtaining in turn an objective definition of the risk involved which could be checked against subjective interpretation.

Simulation Collaboration With Private and Public Scenarios
Within a compass simulation, the scenario created can be used for private experiments or be made public and disclosed to shared users. This enables simulation collaboration and traceability of assumptions made, down to individual level, if desired. The sharing rights are governed by the established file repository framework and come with similar flexibility and control as when sharing models and stories or any other SAP Analytics Cloud artifact. 

Simulation Persistency
Simulations can be saved in the file repository alongside models and other artifacts for reuse and administration. This way, not only collaborations are enabled, but also the benefit of concept traceability: Assumptions made in the past can be easily retrieved and compared to the actuals later for validation of simulation approach. This, if done along time, can help improving understanding of the data dynamic within own company. 

Driver Uncertainty Configuration
All possible drivers in the model for a chosen KPI will be automatically detected and simulation can be started right away. Simply enter the minimum and maximum values expected for a desired driver; these will be used as guidance for the impact calculation. Model the fluctuation behaviour by choosing between normal and uniform distribution type. 

On-the-spot activating / deactivating of effects
Single-click interaction to include or remove uncertainty effects for simulation, without remodelling scenario. This allows for agile on-the-spot experiments when working towards a conceptual grouping of assumptions. 

Join Our Journey

With the general release of compass, the first step is done towards the long term vision that some of you might already have seen in Data Unleashed 2024 .  While the general release will not come with AI integration, we strive to improve compass constantly and our vision still remains clear. We invite you to join us on our journey to push compass further by trying it out once it is generally available and let us know how it can help you even more by using the influence portal. 

Keep an eye on compass too with the Roadmap Explorer!

entry.title: Re: CDP - Sales/Service V2 integration - Initial Data Load
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,

 

For the configuration setup you can follow the below steps. 

  1. In the C4C, Go to User Menu > Settings >  All Settings >  Integration > Communication Systems
    under the the communication systems of C4C, configure the hostname of the URL to be https://cdp.Eu5-prod.gigya.com. Do not configure the full listener URL here from the CDP application.
  2. In the C4C, Go to User Menu > Settings >  All Settings >  Integration > Communication Configurations
    under the communication configuration of C4C, set the target entity API path to be the rest of the URL present in the listener under OAuth2 which is
    /api/businessunits/business-unitid/applications/application-id/dataevents/odmevents, there is visible in the CDP application created under Connect > Sources > Your C4C application where the listener URL is present.
  3. For testing the configurations(Accounts/Individual customers). Create a new account from C4C quick create screen/ Update the existing account and SAVE.
     

     

  4. Next, you can navigate to the path Settings > Integration > Message Monitoring and select the Outbound Tab.
    You can see the status of the webservice messages.


    Regards

    Niveditha Krishnam

entry.title: Re: Scheduling in PP - Lead time vs Basic date scheduling - Planned order vs Production order

I am unable to identify where this scheduling type is being fetched from. Please refer to the attached screenshot below.

entry.title: Re: Building a RAP Application: From Custom Actions to Sending Emails – A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
Hello @ertugrul_bagci 

good article, thanks you for this. Three things for best practice: Better use the Core Data Service instead the table and/or normalize the fields to standard. Use Odata V4 as Standard, because than there are more possibilities in extending the UI. Share the source Code, not only screenshots.

Greetings 

Björn

entry.title: Re: how to change customizing request to workbench request
entry.content: Is it possible to change a workbench tr to customizing tr?

entry.title: Re: Webdynpro application configuration error
entry.content: f***in' hell man...

entry.title: Re: [CPI-Groovy]: Sort XML Nodes based on the start date
entry.content:
Sorting xml with Groovy is quite well explained in the answer to this stack overflow question. Adjusting this to your requirement gives the following Groovy script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.*

Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(Reader)
    def PerPerson = new XmlParser().parse(body)

    PerPerson.PerPerson.each { person ->
        def EmpEmployment = person.employmentNav.EmpEmployment
        if (EmpEmployment.size() == 1) {
            def areAllJobsActive = EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav.EmpJob.every { job -> job.emplStatusNav.PicklistOption.localeLabel.text() == 'Active' }
            if (areAllJobsActive) {
                EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav[0].children().sort(true) { job -> job.startDate.text() }
            }
        }
    }

    message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(PerPerson))
    return message
}

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: nvarchar(max) fields truncating afte...
entry.content:
According to CR for VS PAM ODBC 18 is not supported, it is supported via OLE DB.

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/f871031e-757c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

Your Options are to set database location to OLE DB or use ODBC 17 client.

I recall discussing this with R&D but I don't recall the reasons why ODBC can't be made to work. Often there are differences between ODBC and OLE DB clients, sometimes ODBC work and sometimes OLE DB work... sometimes they both work, it appears ODBC 18 is not 100% compatible...

In CR 9 when R&D rewrote a huge chunk of the code they separated CR's database component into a separate dll because CR had so many "hacks" to "fix" client bugs they decided it's no longer a CR issue, if there are bugs in the Clients the makers had to fix them, it's not a CR issue.

SP 37 will not likely fix the issue but still recommend they upgrade to take advantage of the security updates etc.

entry.title: Re: openSAP has moved: Find over 100 former openSAP courses on the SAP Learning site
entry.content: @bgergesaccenture A selection of more than 100 openSAP courses has been migrated and is still available to learners. These migrated courses have been integrated in the SAP Learning site. You’ll find them via search on the SAP Learning site, or (among other courses) in the course listing page, or you can start browsing here on the dedicated New home for openSAP courses page.

entry.title: Re: Using ODBC 18 driver Crystal Reports runtime (SP34) c...
entry.content:
According to CR for VS PAM ODBC 18 is not supported, it is supported via OLE DB.

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/f871031e-757c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

Your Options are to set database location to OLE DB or use ODBC 17 client.

I recall discussing this with R&D but I don't recall the reasons why ODBC can't be made to work. Often there are differences between ODBC and OLE DB clients, sometimes ODBC work and sometimes OLE DB work... sometimes they both work, it appears ODBC 18 is not 100% compatible...

In CR 9 when R&D rewrote a huge chunk of the code they separated CR's database component into a separate dll because CR had so many "hacks" to "fix" client bugs they decided it's no longer a CR issue, if there are bugs in the Clients the makers had to fix them, it's not a CR issue.

SP 37 was just released but will not likely fix the issue but still recommend you upgrade to take advantage of the security updates etc.

entry.title: Re: Using ODBC 18 driver Crystal Reports runtime (SP34) c...
entry.content:
According to CR for VS PAM ODBC 18 is not supported, it is supported via OLE DB.

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/f871031e-757c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

Your Options are to set database location to OLE DB or use ODBC 17 client.

I recall discussing this with R&D but I don't recall the reasons why ODBC can't be made to work. Often there are differences between ODBC and OLE DB clients, sometimes ODBC work and sometimes OLE DB work... sometimes they both work, it appears ODBC 18 is not 100% compatible...

In CR 9 when R&D rewrote a huge chunk of the code they separated CR's database component into a separate dll because CR had so many "hacks" to "fix" client bugs they decided it's no longer a CR issue, if there are bugs in the Clients the makers had to fix them, it's not a CR issue.

SP 37 will not likely fix the issue but still recommend you upgrade to take advantage of the security updates etc.

entry.title: How to generate a BOL before PGI, by posting partial good issues.
entry.content:
Example: Operator has an outbound order of 1760 bags. Upon completing 880 bags, which filled a truck, the operator generated a Bill of Ladings (BOL) prior to posting good issues, but the printed document lacks product descriptions. 

Any assistance in resolving this issues would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in Advance!

Yaswanth.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition: Unable to see the Italy...
entry.content:
Hello, Rajender.

I saw the document you are trying to Display XML is in 'Created' status and accordantly to SAP Help Statuses for Italy eInvoice this action is not supported for this status.

If you still face this issue with other documents with different status, maybe you should consider create a new ticket in SAP Technical Support CA-GTF-CSC-EDO-IT component.

Hope it assis you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - How to turn mandatory...
entry.content:
Hi RitSilva,

For setting the mandatory fields for any object 

1.Navigate to Settings -- Extensibility administrator

2. Select the business entities for example: Cases, go to field attributes and uncheck the show only custom fields. 

Finally select the required fields and SAVE.

Thanks

Niveditha Krishnam

entry.title: Re: Crystal report upgrade
entry.content:
No, you need to get a valid Keycode to be able to install it.

So someone who does have access can purchase CR 2020 and will receive a valid keycode.

You can then copy the file over to your PC's to install, be sure to purchase a copy for each user running the Report Designer. On the download link I posted above you can also chat with Sales and determine how many users will be using CR Designer and purchase a bulk License agreement.

See this for CR Licensing: title is for CR for VS but same is true for Crystal Reports.

Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Licensing

CR Designer will complain if it can't connect, Once installed you can change this regisrty key to stop CR from trying to connect to check for updates: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP BusinessObjects\Suite XI 4.0\Crystal Reports - DisableCheckForUpdates

CR is based on the Honour system, you do need to get a valid Keycode so at least one copy is purchased, once you have it CR assumes you will respect the license agreement and purchase per user or limit it to one user.

I suggest contacting Schneider electric Scada software, if they have an OEM agreement with SAP it's possible they may have a reduced price per user for you rather than the default CR cost. But as I said, check with them first to confirm you can upgrade to CR 2020, a lot of things could break if their software doesn't support upgrading.

entry.title: How to correct a Handling Unit (HU) when there's a discrepancy?
entry.content:
Example: An operator accidentally created a handling unit (HU) of 40 bags on a partial pallet containing only 28 bags.

Can this process also be done on the radio frequencies (RF) device?

entry.title: Re: PRD: Unable to convert UTC timezone to specific Timezone
entry.content: @Shariqubadar I tried this, but I didn't see the Format_Type in my advanced section. Is there a way to add it?

entry.title: Re: In personas 3.0 how do we wrap a text to show in muli...
entry.content: Well, there is no way to turn a single-line backend field to a multi-line one by just changing a property in a flavor - but a lot is possible via scripting.

entry.title: Re: What is a Pacemaker Work center in capacity schedulin...
entry.content:
Hi @Emeric,

A production version is a combination of a material's BOM and it's task list. You can look it up to learn more.

You create one in t-code C223.

entry.title: Re: Unable to change URL in Target Mapping in Launchpad d...
entry.content: check tcode lpd_cust

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel Add-in Not working
entry.content: Have you found a solution for this issue? We are seeing the same issue in our QA tenant but not production.

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
hi @Tomas_Buryanek 

the purpose is:

create a table for example ZTEST_TAB with the password type field for example auth_client_secret
inside a custom report, do the Select auth_client_secret From ZTEST_TAB
inside the code I will have to use the auth_client_secret field in the program logic to do an authentication, like this:

entry.title: How to remove a handling unit from a trailer which is an outbound delivery?
entry.content:
Can you please provide a job aid on removing a handling unit (HU) from a (outbound) loaded trailer? 

Example: Operator incorrectly loaded a HU with an incorrect number of bags.

entry.title: Navigation to Another SAP Fiori App (VA03)
entry.content:
Objective->

In this article we will navigate from custom Fiori app to Sales Order VA03 while click on Sales order number using CDS view.

Semantic object : Represents a business entity such as a sales order.

Action : Describes which operation like Display/Modify. 

Let us first find out the semantic object details of target application i.e. Sales order VA03 display through Fiori application library.

Now search desired target application.

Semantic Object : SalesOrder

We need to use these details in our CDS view to navigate to target application.

Annotation used for creating a link & attached to Sales order VA03 Fiori app.

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'SalesOrder'

Code - 

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'SalesOrder'

@UI.lineItem: [{ position:10, semanticObjectAction: 'display' }]

key tr.vbak_vbeln, //debit/credit/return in 2B

Lets open the application.

Thanks...

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud @Hana4HANA

entry.title: Last 10 SAP Activate 1 Minute Video's
entry.content:
It is that time of year again where we within the SAP Activate Methodology team publish many product update videos bringing awareness to the SAP Activate Methodology updates and many SAP product updates. The list below is the last 10 SAP Activate 1 Minute Videos, but be sure, there are many more just from 2024.

Last 10 SAP Activate 1 Minute Videos:

  1. SAP Activate for transition to SAP Cloud ALM
  2. Activate Minute - Guided Implementation
  3. Simple Transport Mode
  4. Localization Tag
  5. Activate Minute - Roadmap Overview page
  6. Activate Minute - Fieldglass Overview page
  7. Activate Minute - Ariba Roadmap Release Notes
  8. Activate Minute - Business Network for Supplier Portal Public Edition
  9. Identifying Release Updates to Tasks in SAP Cloud ALM
  10. SAP Activate SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 Release

    For the full SAP 1 Minute Video Playlist, click here: SAP Activate 1 Minute Video Playlist

entry.title: Re: In personas 3.0 how do we wrap a text to show in muli...
entry.content: Do you have any scripting handy for the Wrap?

entry.title: WT for flat-rate SV-contributions for Employer DE
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I need to configure a WT, which should be 21 % flat rate SV- contribution paid by the Employer (German Payroll related to long term accounts) based on a WT in IT 0015. This shouldn't appear on employee's payslip as it is a cost of the employer and this is for reporting purpose only. Does anyone know, how to configure this?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Webdynpro application configuration error
entry.content:
For me a step to the solution (still not sure if everything works) was

  • Implement Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3503392 and upload Role SAP_FI_GLO_GTI_AR_ACCOUNTANT to S4H system
  • Read the background of OBN in note https://me.sap.com/notes/2726641

So basically you need to make sure you have the OBN access rights (here "IDGTSETTINGS.display") assigned to a role and that role assigned to you

entry.title: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
Hi,

We have following case where in we have internal table data say ITAB (fields: matnr, werks) from previous CDS and lgort (Storage loc.) on selection screen

Now, Need to get SUM of stock (MARD-LABST) at matnr level.

meaning fetch from MARD based on ITAB matnr, werks, selection screen lgort and then SUM LAST as well.

tried by creating 2 CDS view as below it doesn't filter based on 'For all entries' where condition ( even hardcoded values doesn't work). it sums LABST for all werks and lgort. expectation is it should SUM only where clause matnr, werks and selection screen lgort.

___________________________________

matnr, werks,lgort,labst->CDS1

matnr, SUM(labst) group by matnr-->CDS2 ( select from CDS1..meaning calling CDS1 in CDS2)

Program:

Select matnr, stock
from CDS2
Inner join CDS1 on CDS2.matnr = CDS1.matnr
For all entries of ITAB where CDS1.matnr = itab-matnr
and CDS1.werks = itab-werks
and CDS1.lgort in select options of selection screen

_______________________________________

what I understood is while calling CDS2 aggregation already happened before where clause consideration which is in program and using werks and lgort in where clause doesn't work or filter...but it filers by matnr as matnr is in both CDS views.

 

Any suggestion here?

entry.title: Re: 🇳🇱 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Zoetermeer, NL)
entry.content: I may join this hands on session Online ???? I m from Pakistan

entry.title: Re: Error when setting the deletion flag
entry.content:
Hello

I have seen this issue in the past and it was related to a database inconsistency. 
I would suggest you to implement report ZPPSFC079B from Note 434630 and check if it can find and fix any inconsistency.

Best regards,
Caetano Almeida

entry.title: Re: how to call a OData Servie Of BTP From Abap Report
entry.content: Hmmm not sure that a link to the OP's own question could be useful 😉

entry.title: Re: Hello Dears,i need your help to force approval for PR or PO, how i can do that ?
entry.content: To force the approval always? If so, why going into the approval? Or if you want to approve an existing workflow, is it to be done immediately or in a batch from time to time? See here all the questions about the topic: https://www.google.com/search?q=approve+PR+automatically+site%3Asap.com

entry.title: Re: Unable to change URL in Target Mapping in Launchpad d...
entry.content: not able to find this URL there or sem object

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content: Remove the "for all entry" and where clauses in your ABAP query, add UP TO 1 ROWS, and try again to make sure that your CDS views are fine. If you get only one line, then the culprit is the "where" clause (possibly the classic issue with missing leading zeroes i.e. the ALPHA conversion routine).

entry.title: Re: Expense Report Posting to S/4 from Concur and Error Handling
entry.content:
DO NOT USE CTE_FIN_FBL_SEQUENCE_HANDLER to schedule FIN Posting job. This report is deprecated.

Schedule the Feedback Loop (FIN Posting job), through FIN Posting wizard at CTE_SETUP > Financial Posting > Change import > Automatic Import.

If you want to create your own job, create it directly in SM36/SM37 for program CTE_FND_FBL_SEQUENCE_HANDLER, which is the same one used in standard job creation via FIN Posting wizard in newer versions.

SAP S/4HANA integration with SAP Concur solutions SAP ERP integration with SAP Concur solutions

entry.title: Re: how to call a OData Servie Of BTP From Abap Report
entry.content: Hi Sandra

entry.title: Re: how to call a OData Servie Of BTP From Abap Report
entry.content: I am facing some issues with my browser haha, but thank you Sandra! This is the link that I wanted to share https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/consuming-a-business-technology-platform-service-from-an-s-4-hana-system/ba-p/13557416

entry.title: Input control : select and deselect nodes in the hierarchy using Javascript
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an input control on the Profit Center with hierarchy enabled, and I would like to achieve the following functionality using Javascript:

Based on my drop-down selection, I want to include certain nodes and exclude others from the hierarchy. I can currently include nodes with the following code:

IC_ProfitC.getInputControlDataSource().setSelectedMembers(["[Y_PROFITC].[MAIN_HIER].&[0000000080]","[Y_PROFITC].[MAIN_HIER].&[0000000031]"]);

However, I am unsure of how to exclude/unselect one or more nodes from the input control.

Can anyone assist with how to achieve this functionality?

Thanks in advance,

Malya

entry.title: How to reverse a UD to continue with DL process.
entry.content: A UD and PGI was made prior to loading complete. How it can be reversed to continue with the downloading process?

entry.title: Re: Exception during start of deployment for deploy type...

entry.title: "Manage Workforce" history is not displayed
entry.content:
In Manage Workforce app, for any given employee recently created, there seems to be an issue within "Show Change Log" option.

At first, there are a couple of existing lines when the area is reached. However, the only fields with value are "Changed by" and "Changed on". Fields such as "Field Name", "Old Value" and "New Value" appear empty.

Can this behavior be explained?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: "Manage Workforce" history is not displayed
entry.content:
In general, the entries that originated the worker are not considered "changes". Only what is done afterwards.

Typical signs of such event are:

  • "Change Type" field showing the value "Insert"
  • Fields "Field Name", "Old Value" and "New Value" are empty.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @Matt_Fraser- I was thinking the same thing. They have already provided the /TB6 wage type (Sec.Act -Prev. year comp) to determine which employees are required to do so.

entry.title: Re: ***-stage.lms.sapsf.com refused to connect error whil...
entry.content: @radhar, can you check if the cookies are enabled at the browser level (Browser Configuration Requirements for SAP SuccessFactors)? If you can't enable them at the browser level, the "Enable SuccessFactors Learning third-party cookie mechanism" configuration (KBA 2253268) can be enabled at the BizX provisioning level by an SAP Partner or SAP Support.

entry.title: Configuring eligibility through "Global Rule Details"
entry.content:
Calling all those who are experienced in rigging up eligibility rules. I'm trying to configure the "Global Rule Details" for our Short Term Incentive template to exclude about 40 individuals even if they meet the other eligibility criteria defined in the Global Rule Details. 

Anyone have suggestions on how to configure the eligiblity through Global Rule Details in order to exclude a certain population from the Short-Term Incentive plan template?

I've tried the following:

Creating a "Parent Or" statement for the following options:

1. Job Information. Employment Details. Job Information. Employment Details. Biographical Information. Person ID is not equal to filled in 8 digit person ID

2. Job Information. Employment Details. Job Information. Location. Location Code is not equal to filled in 4 digit location code associated with this population

3. Job Information. Employment Details. Job Information. Location. Location is not equal to filled in location name for this population

 

I've also tried moving either of three options elsewhere within the eligibility logic in the original "AND" statement and "OR" statements.

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Take Charge: Simplifying SAP Fieldglass Company Configurations
entry.content:
Hey, Configuration Manager! Did you know that you have control of a number of SAP Fieldglass’ company configurations? In the Company Configuration tile, you find a list of the available configs that you can manage. This tile lets you enable, disable, lock, and hide configurations related to the different areas of the SAP Fieldglass system, such as Job Posting, Statement of Work, Invoice, and Integration.

 

To find a configuration in the huge list of available configs, you can quickly jump into the related big area of the setting by using the Company Configuration header:

 

But pay attention to the complexity level guidance for each configuration!

When enabling a high-complexity company configuration, a pop-up appears, explaining that the selected configuration may impact workflows and functionality. You must provide a reason and acknowledge the associated risks. We strongly recommend testing these kinds of configurations in a nonproduction environment before enablement.

For the medium-complexity company configs, you see a hover message which includes recommendation to contact SAP Fieldglass Product Support for further guidance.

There are also some configurations that can only be managed by SAP Fieldglass. The hover message explains that you must contact Product Support to change these settings.

Not sure what a specific company config does?

The View In-App Help may assist you! By selecting its icon, you find information about a list of configurations. And if you need to learn more, there’s a link that redirects you to our Help Portal.

 

Are you ready to take control?

Dive into the Company Configuration tile and start setting up your SAP Fieldglass company today. Your time saved and your work made easier, just a few clicks away!

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Does anyone know if Federal changes for 2025 are forthcoming anytime soon from BSI?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Transport excel report from sac dev to prd
entry.content:
You may have to transport the object (e.g. Story) along with the data. There will be a check box to include data or exclude data when moving. If you can check that checkbox , it should move along with the data. 

Thanks 

Renuka.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Test Orchestration and Tester assignment using Test Plans in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Can we test the enhancement and customisation in above test plan .

What are the limitations of this functionality?

entry.title: Enable/Disable custom action button in SAP Fiori List Report
entry.content:
I have created a Fiori elements list report app. In this app, I have a table with single select radio button and also a custom action button at the toolbar. Now, this custom button will be enabled only when I select any of the row using radio button. (In Manifest.json I have used requireSelection: true). Till now everything works as expected. Now, I want to enable this custom button when user selected any row using radio button + particular column in that row contains a value 'X' (condition based).
How do I achieve that. Please share your suggestions. 

Thanks, 

Teja.

entry.title: Re: Receiving from Production in SAP Extended Warehouse Management - Overview
entry.content: @Jörg_Michaelis  Could you please help me with the link. Looks like it is expired.

entry.title: A New Home Page Awaits: Meet the Layout Manager in SAP Fieldglass
entry.content:
Hey there, SAP Fieldglass admins!

We’ve got some exciting news to share with you! There’s a new kid on the block: the Layout Manager admin object. Think of it as your friendly neighborhood tool that lets you create awesome home page layouts and link them to different user roles. No more generic home pages – it’s all about what your different users need to see to nail their daily tasks!

Why Should You Care?

Imagine walking into your favorite coffee shop. They know exactly what you want, have it ready for you, and you’re in and out in no time. That’s what this new update is aiming for – a personalized experience right from the moment you log into SAP Fieldglass.

This home page revamp was designed to make sure you can navigate easily and see the content that matters most – all in a modern, streamlined design.

No More Customizing Through My Preferences

Yup, we’re shaking things up a bit. You won’t be able to tweak your home page through the Home Page Items in the My Preferences tab anymore. Instead, the new Layout Manager admin object is your go-to.

Personalized Views for Every User Role

You get a set of four default layouts personalized for different roles:

  • Administrator Layout
  • Finance and Reporting Layout
  • Hiring Manager Layout
  • PMO Layout

But feel free to create and configure other layouts the way you want to!

 

Embrace the change and get ready for a more efficient, tailored, and visually appealing SAP Fieldglass experience. No more fumbling around in your home page!

entry.title: Enhancements for SAP Community - December 2024
entry.content:
I am honored to be picking up the mantle of sharing news regarding enhancements (meaning improvements and bug fixes) to the SAP Community. Following are the enhancements released since the last posting.

UI and Bug Fixes

  • Mobile UI

    • Ensured there was a sufficient gap between ''Start a discussion'/'Create a blog' and feed sorting drop down list on feed pages

 

  • Latest Post UI
    • Ensure consistent use of green ticks for accepted solution in Latest Post widget in Question pages Where do we configure SAP FSM Item types? - SAP Community

  • Mobile experience scrolling issue was fixed.
    • Users add difficulty scrolling down the page to get to posts. This issue has been fixed.

 

Community Events Page

Events creators can now select one or multiple industries as a ‘Label’ when creating an Event.

 

Products & Technology Board pages Managed Tags list


The list of the top 10 SAP Managed tags for a specific board page under Products & Technology have been added in the right-hand rail. For example, of the ‘CRM and Customer Experience Boards’ you will find the following top 10 SAP Managed tags:

 

Posting Comment or Answer on Question


It is now easier to differentiate between answering and replying to a question as the distinction between the two has been made clearer with additional verbiage around each option.

 

Floating Indicator


A floating indicator has been added to show which pages have access restrictions in place.

 

Placing of Subscribe button on Posts


It is now easier to subscribe to posts as the subscribe button has now been place at the top of every posts.

Example Question and Discussions:

Example Blog:

 

Custom content block in right column to group landing page


A custom content block is available on Group Landing page to provide additional information or resources.

entry.title: Re: How to get the API Key for S4 HANA Cloud trial (Not for the public sandbox).
entry.content:
I assume you are using a trial version of S/4HANA Cloud Public from https://www.sap.com/products/erp/s4hana/trial.html?

In the FAQ, it says, "The trial system only offers a selected subset of the overall functionality of S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Key user capabilities like ... integration with SAP BTP are not offered in this trial."

entry.title: Re: SAP FICA MAPPING
entry.content: The mapping is done with TCode EK02. Here you can specify the main/sun combination in addition to the company code and division to determine the GL Account.

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content: And what about if we have to pick 20 pc and we have expir date in two bins? In my case system determined a bin with oldes stock and stock if stock quatity match. In this case ewm not follow FEFO.
